# Mirror of the branch-protection ruleset's REQUIRED status checks for main.
# The cichecks tripwire (internal/cichecks) fails if any entry here has no
# backing job in .github/workflows/ci.yml — so a renamed/removed required
# job is caught in CI instead of silently wedging every PR (as generate-clean
# -> repo-gates did after #63). Keep this file in sync with the ruleset when
# you change either; see CONTRIBUTING.
test (ubuntu-latest)
test (macos-latest)
lint
cross-build
generate-clean
